posts.author: ArkiTech (ArkiTech)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am just trying to create a new integration feature in my new app starting with the GitHub Template, but after creating a tunnel and entering it on the feature page and on clicking Create, it just throws an error “Failed to create new app feature”

feature create error1915×922 82.8 KB

Could you please help me?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ArkiTech,

Would you be able to please fill this form so our team can take a look into this? Please add as much detail about your case as possible.

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias
